column.name: gmt_offset
column.remarks: offset (in hours) from GMT to local standard time

column.name: elevation
column.remarks: elevation in m above mean sea level

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm2_5_atm_a + pm2_5_atm_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm2_5_atm

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pressure_a + pressure_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pressure

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm2_5_alt_a + pm2_5_alt_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm2_5_alt

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((scattering_coefficient_a + scattering_coefficient_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: scattering_coefficient

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((deciviews_a + deciviews_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: deciviews

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((visual_range_a + visual_range_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: visual_range

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((count_0_3_um_a + count_0_3_um_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: count_0_3_um

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((count_0_5_um_a + count_0_5_um_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: count_0_5_um

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((count_1_0_um_a + count_1_0_um_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: count_1_0_um

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((count_2_5_um_a + count_2_5_um_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: count_2_5_um

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((count_5_0_um_a + count_5_0_um_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: count_5_0_um

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((count_10_0_um_a + count_10_0_um_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: count_10_0_um

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm1_0_cf_1_a + pm1_0_cf_1_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm1_0_cf_1

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm1_0_atm_a + pm1_0_atm_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm1_0_atm

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm2_5_cf_1_a + pm2_5_cf_1_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm2_5_cf_1

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm10_0_atm_a + pm10_0_atm_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm10_0_atm

column.defaultValueComputed: GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((pm10_0_cf_1_a + pm10_0_cf_1_b) / (2)::double precision) STORED
column.name: pm10_0_cf_1
